author: reallygood83
description: Run NotebookLM/Tavily-style deep research and publish Markdown plus HTML into your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: reallygood83
manifest.description: Run NotebookLM/Tavily-style deep research and publish Markdown plus HTML into your vault.
manifest.name: ReallyGood Research

name: ReallyGood Research

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description: - Use official uvx NotebookLM commands by default so Login NotebookLM works before permanent nlm install.\n- Migrate saved bare NotebookLM commands to uvx defaults.\n- Update README onboarding for public BRAT users.

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description: - Add copyable NotebookLM install command in the research console and settings.\n- Add NotebookLM setup/login popup with install, login, and command output.\n- Update README onboarding for public BRAT users.

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description: - Remove maintainer-local NotebookLM checkout paths from public Obsidian settings text.\n- Reset old saved local NotebookLM commands to portable defaults during settings migration.\n- Keep default NotebookLM commands as nlm login and notebooklm-mcp for public installs.

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description: - Keep Obsidian research jobs running after the modal is closed.\n- Reopening the console restores the active job log and HTML path.\n- Prevent duplicate starts from launching a second concurrent job.

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Render inline Markdown formatting in generated HTML reports.

Fixes visible raw syntax such as **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, inline code, and Markdown links in browser HTML reports.

Verification:
- npm test: 32/32 passed
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs
- Regenerated the affected LearningMaster HTML report and confirmed bold syntax renders as <strong> instead of raw **text**.

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix Tavily Research timing where status can be completed before the report body is available. The plugin now keeps polling until a report body is present and will no longer save a source-only Tavily report as success.

Verification:
- npm test: 31/31 passed
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs
- Repaired the affected LearningMaster note from the Tavily request id

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix Tavily Research report rendering when the Research API returns the report body in the content field.

Verification:
- npm test: 30/30 passed
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs
- Installed LearningMaster plugin copy updated to 0.1.23
releases.name: v0.1.23

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Obsidian community-compatible release tag matching manifest.json version 0.1.23.

This release mirrors v0.1.23 assets without the leading v because Obsidian requires the release tag to exactly match manifest.json version.

Fix included:
- Render Tavily Research API report bodies returned in the content field.

Verification:
- npm test: 30/30 passed
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## v0.1.22

- Added Tavily API key save/test controls directly to the ReallyGood Research console.
- Password fields are cleared after save in both the console and plugin settings.
- Tavily keys remain stored in `~/.reallygood-research.env`, not in Obsidian plugin settings.
- Added modal-level regression coverage for the key save flow, disabled-state restoration, notice text, and secret-not-in-settings boundary.

Verification:
- `node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs`
- `npm test` -> 30 passing tests
- `git diff --check`
- ULW evidence: C001 CLI report generation, C002 plugin UI save-flow JSON, C003 installed-plugin copy inspection
- RepoPrompt review: PASS, no blockers
- Ouroboros QA: PASS, 0.89
releases.name: v0.1.22

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## v0.1.21

- AI provider CLI discovery now checks OS-specific executable names, including Windows `.exe`, `.cmd`, and `.ps1` wrappers.
- Added common Windows npm/AppData lookup paths for Codex, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and Antigravity-style CLIs.
- Antigravity now resolves both `agy` and `antigravity` command names; local macOS verification found `agy` installed even when `antigravity` was not.
- README now documents the provider discovery behavior.

Verification:
- `node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs`
- `npm test` -> 29 passing tests
- `git diff --check`
- Installed Obsidian plugin copy inspected for v0.1.21 Windows candidates and `agy`/`antigravity` support

Not tested:
- Physical Windows host with live provider CLIs
releases.name: v0.1.21

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## Fixed

- HTML report navigation now uses stable ASCII-safe section anchors.
- Korean/non-ASCII headings keep their visible text, but generated `href` and heading `id` targets now match reliably in browsers.

## Verification

- `node --check src/index.mjs && node --check main.js && node --check bin/deep-research.mjs`
- `npm test` (29 passing)
- `git diff --check`
- Generated long HTML report and clicked `Report navigation` with Playwright: `#section-3` hash was applied and `scrollY` moved from `0` to `1694`.
- Installed plugin files copied to `/Users/moon/Documents/LearningMaster/.obsidian/plugins/reallygood-research/` and checked for version `0.1.20` plus the ASCII anchor logic.
releases.name: v0.1.20

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## Changed

- Tavily report generation now requires `TAVILY_API_KEY` and always uses the Tavily Research API for saved research output.
- Removed the Obsidian `Tavily keyless` control and removed `--tavily-keyless` from generated commands.
- Legacy `--tavily-keyless` CLI usage now exits with a clear setup message instead of creating shallow Search-based reports.
- Updated MCP schemas so `run_research`, `tavily_search`, and `tavily_extract` no longer advertise keyless mode.
- Updated README setup guidance for BRAT, CLI, and MCP usage.

## Verification

- `node --check src/index.mjs && node --check main.js && node --check bin/deep-research.mjs`
- `npm test` (28 passing)
- `git diff --check`
- Installed plugin files copied to `/Users/moon/Documents/LearningMaster/.obsidian/plugins/reallygood-research/` and checked for version `0.1.19`, no keyless UI, no keyless CLI preview, and Research API key requirement.
- Legacy `--tavily-keyless` CLI invocation exits 1 with the expected error.

## Note

Live Tavily Research was not called during release verification because no local `~/.reallygood-research.env` key was configured and live calls spend Tavily credits.
releases.name: v0.1.19

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## ReallyGood Research v0.1.18

- Removes reader-hostile execution diagnostics from generated Markdown and HTML reports.
- Hides Research status, provider metadata, failed AI CLI command output, and quick Tavily answer snippets from the report body.
- Keeps operational details in `.deep-research-publisher/*.json` history for debugging.
- Renames reader-facing sections to NotebookLM Deep Research, Tavily Deep Research, Tavily Web Sources, and Synthesized Brief.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 28 passed
- Regenerated `/Users/moon/Documents/LearningMaster/000-research/2026-07-07T07-37-42Z-ai-fan.md` and `.html`; both are clean of the removed blocks
- Installed LearningMaster plugin updated to 0.1.18
releases.name: v0.1.18

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## ReallyGood Research v0.1.17

- Tavily now uses the Research API when a local `TAVILY_API_KEY` is configured.
- Tavily keyless mode remains Search-only and is no longer treated as deep research.
- HTML reports now include a sticky navigation sidebar, anchor links, table rendering, code block handling, and improved report layout.
- Existing browser handoff / Open HTML behavior remains unchanged.

Important:
- Tavily MCP is optional for external agents. The Obsidian plugin uses the Tavily HTTP API directly.
- Rotate any Tavily API key that was pasted into chat or screenshots.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 28 passed
- Playwright file render check: navigation 18 items, table rendered, links 64
- Installed LearningMaster plugin updated to 0.1.17

Not tested:
- Live Tavily Research call, because the key shown in chat should be rotated before use.
releases.name: v0.1.17

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## ReallyGood Research v0.1.16

- Fixes HTML export so browser-opened reports render as visual pages, not Markdown source code.
- Strips Obsidian frontmatter from HTML output.
- Renders headings, paragraphs, links, lists, blockquotes, and basic report styling.
- Keeps the Open HTML / active-report browser handoff from v0.1.15.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 27 passed
- Playwright file render check: no pre block, 50 paragraphs, 46 links
- Regenerated `/Users/moon/Documents/LearningMaster/000-research/2026-07-07T07-37-42Z-ai-fan.html` as visual HTML
- Installed LearningMaster plugin updated to 0.1.16
releases.name: v0.1.16

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## ReallyGood Research v0.1.15

- Adds a browser handoff for existing reports: use the ribbon action or command palette action **Open active HTML report in browser** while viewing a generated Markdown or HTML report.
- Keeps the post-run **Open HTML** button from v0.1.14 for newly generated reports.
- Resolves active Markdown reports to a same-name `.html` file, then opens it with Electron shell in the system browser.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs
- node --check main.js
- npm test
- Installed plugin smoke test against `/Users/moon/Documents/LearningMaster/000-research/2026-07-07T07-37-42Z-ai-fan.md` -> matching `.html`
releases.name: v0.1.15

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
## ReallyGood Research v0.1.14

- Adds an Open HTML button after a research run so generated HTML reports open in the system browser instead of being viewed as awkward raw HTML inside Obsidian.
- Keeps Markdown as the canonical Obsidian note and uses Electron shell handoff for HTML reports.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs
- node --check main.js
- npm test
- Installed plugin smoke test for openHtmlReport
releases.name: v0.1.14

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Trim Tavily evidence in generated research notes.

- Render Tavily as Answer plus Web Sources.
- Cap Tavily answer text, source snippets, and oversized source titles.
- Keep NotebookLM deep research readable as the primary report body.
- Installed LearningMaster plugin updated to v0.1.13.
releases.name: v0.1.13

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Format generated research notes for Obsidian reading.

- Add Obsidian properties: title, aliases, tags, type, status, created, research_mode, providers, and html_export.
- Add summary and provider metadata callouts.
- Shorten AI synthesis failures in Markdown while retaining full details in history JSON.
- Keep Markdown/HTML generation behavior unchanged.
releases.name: v0.1.12

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Clarify run mode labels in the Obsidian plugin.

- Tavily-only runs now show Tavily search instead of deep research.
- Tavily plus a local AI CLI shows Tavily search + AI synthesis.
- NotebookLM-enabled runs show NotebookLM deep research.
- No behavior change to saved Markdown/HTML; this release fixes the misleading UI/log label.
releases.name: v0.1.11

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix Obsidian AI CLI resolution for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Grok, and Antigravity.

- Resolve local AI CLIs through PATH plus common Homebrew, local-bin, npm-global, Bun, Cargo, and NVM paths.
- Run shell commands through zsh on macOS-style Obsidian runtimes.
- Add Antigravity as a built-in AI synthesis provider.
- Migrate stale saved Codex synthesis defaults back to None so broken Codex installs do not block Tavily/NotebookLM Markdown and HTML output.
- Keep AI synthesis failures non-fatal; provider research still saves to Markdown, optional HTML, and history.
releases.name: v0.1.10

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
- Fixes Tavily runs failing when optional AI synthesis CLI is missing.
- Tavily/NotebookLM provider output is now saved even if Codex/Claude/Gemini/Grok/custom synthesis fails.
- The Markdown note and history JSON record the AI synthesis error instead of aborting the run.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js
- npm test: 23/23 passing
- Installed plugin generated Tavily Markdown/HTML with resultCount 5 while a missing AI command was recorded as an AI Synthesis error.
releases.name: v0.1.9

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
- Fixes NotebookLM login button appearing stuck after successful auth.
- Detects notebooklm-cli success/auth-check output and completes the plugin action promptly.
- Migrates local notebooklm-cli commands from uv to /opt/homebrew/bin/uv.

Verification:
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 22/22 passing
- nlm login --check: Authentication valid, 56 notebooks, usmjkim23@gmail.com
- Live NotebookLM MCP fast run generated Markdown/HTML with status completed and sourcesFound 10.
releases.name: v0.1.8

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
- Fixes NotebookLM login from Obsidian when Homebrew uv is not on the plugin shell PATH.
- Adds /opt/homebrew/bin, /usr/local/bin, ~/.local/bin, and ~/.cargo/bin to plugin-spawned shell commands.
- Updates installed command guidance to use /opt/homebrew/bin/uv for the local notebooklm-cli checkout.

Verification:
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 21/21 passing
- PATH=/usr/bin:/bin auth check reaches notebooklm-cli auth instead of uv not found
- Installed LearningMaster plugin updated to 0.1.7.
releases.name: v0.1.7

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
- Adds NotebookLM login command support inside the Obsidian plugin.
- Adds Login NotebookLM / Run login buttons that launch the configured notebooklm-cli login command.
- Keeps authentication storage delegated to notebooklm-cli; no Google credentials are stored by the plugin.
- Updates settings schema to v4.

Verification:
- node --check main.js
- npm test: 21/21 passing
- Installed LearningMaster plugin files updated to 0.1.6 with local login command.
releases.name: v0.1.6

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
- Adds real NotebookLM provider execution through the configured notebooklm-mcp stdio server from notebooklm-cli.
- Calls research_start then research_status with auto_import and writes the returned report/sources to Markdown and HTML.
- Removes Odysseus from runtime provider options; it remains reference-only.
- Keeps Tavily keyless as the default immediate plugin path.
- Adds plugin settings for NotebookLM MCP command and max wait.

Verification:
- node --check src/index.mjs main.js bin/deep-research.mjs
- npm test: 20/20 passing
- CLI fake NotebookLM MCP generated Markdown/HTML with mode mcp
- Installed Obsidian plugin generated real Tavily keyless Markdown/HTML with mock false and resultCount 5

Note: Live NotebookLM requires nlm login; local check currently reports Profile not found: default.
releases.name: v0.1.5

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix plugin runs that looked like deep research but were still mock output.

Changes:
- Default plugin runs now use Tavily keyless live research instead of mock mode.
- Old demo settings are migrated from notebooklm,tavily + mock=true to tavily + mock=false + tavilyKeyless=true.
- Mock mode is relabeled as Test mode and described as fake local output only.
- Version bumped for BRAT update detection.

Verified with node --check, npm test, and an installed-plugin Tavily keyless live run producing mock:false, mode:keyless, resultCount:5, Markdown, and HTML.
releases.name: v0.1.4

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Improve the Obsidian plugin console UX and verify HTML export visibility.

Changes:
- Grouped modal controls into Research, Providers, Output, Run mode, and AI synthesis sections.
- Replaced raw provider entry in the console with provider toggles.
- Added output folder control to the console.
- Added a live run summary and clearer ready/running log state.
- Kept Markdown, HTML, and history paths visible in the run log.

Verified with node --check, npm test, and an installed-plugin Tavily keyless HTML smoke test.
releases.name: v0.1.3

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix Tavily setup/run behavior in the BRAT plugin.

Changes:
- Explicit Tavily keyless mode now takes precedence over any stale local TAVILY_API_KEY.
- The plugin's Save key action reports local save separately from Tavily /usage validation, so an invalid key no longer looks like a file-save failure.
- Version bumped for BRAT update detection.

Verified with node --check, npm test, installed-plugin save-key smoke using a temporary HOME, and installed-plugin Tavily keyless smoke.
releases.name: v0.1.2

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Fix BRAT installs by making the Obsidian plugin self-contained.

BRAT installs only release assets such as manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css. v0.1.0 tried to dynamically import src/index.mjs, which was not installed by BRAT. v0.1.1 removes that runtime dependency so the plugin can run directly from BRAT-installed assets.

Assets included:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

Verified with node --check, npm test, and an installed-plugin smoke test in the LearningMaster vault without a src directory.
releases.name: v0.1.1

releases.author: reallygood83
releases.description:
Initial BRAT-ready release for ReallyGood Research.

Install with BRAT using: reallygood83/reallygood-research

Assets included for Obsidian BRAT:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

Includes Obsidian plugin console, local CLI, MCP stdio server, Tavily keyless/API-key modes, and local AI provider CLI selection.
releases.name: v0.1.0
